source_pr.title: planner: remove the unnecessary column `type` from the system table `mysql.bind_info`
source_pr.body:
<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: ref #48875

Problem Summary: planner: remove the unnecessary column `type` from the system table `mysql.bind_info`

### What changed and how does it work?

Introduce by https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/pull/49426. 

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [x] Unit test
- [ ] Integration test
- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [ ] No need to test
  > - [ ] I checked and no code files have been changed.
  > <!-- Or your custom  "No need to test" reasons -->

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [ ] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note

<!-- compatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note -->

Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note.

```release-note
None
```

root_cause_explanation: INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE: This PR removes the unnecessary `type` column from `mysql.bind_info` and updates related queries, bootstrap logic, and golden test outputs. The case evidence is a deterministic SELECT statement against `mysql.bind_info` (with explicit ORDER BY) and does not provide a clear flaky trigger or nondeterminism, so we keep a conservative fallback classification.
fix_pattern: Remove the redundant `type` column from `mysql.bind_info` and update bindinfo/infoschema queries and tests accordingly.

evidence: evidence: "collation , source , `sql_digest` , `plan_digest` from `mysql` . `bind_info` where `update_time` > ? order by `update_time` , `create_time`")) (pkg/infoschema/test/clustertablestest/tables_test.go)
